name: Mikey Ross || Arrested
description:
It's no surprise to me,

I am my own worst enemy.


Arrested while defacing the Hollywood Sign

Their fourth album was going to be major!

And Mikey planned to make sure of that.

Which is why he might have gone a little rouge and defaced the Hollywood sign with Vic.

And the cops might have shown up.

And he might have gotten arrested.

Ben was going to murder him...

At least Vic got away and managed to post the video.

Now he just had to wait in his cell for someone to bail him out.

Worth it.


32k! Last of my catch up milestones. Thank you everyone, truly for enjoying these silly boys and the stories I tell.

This plot is so very Mikey. I can't express that enough. He's truly just the most fun little chaos gremlin around.

So I hope you have fun bailing him out of jail!

Finally #owlkey forever

IYKYK

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.


☆ The band is about to release their fourth album; The Last Letter Never Sent.
☆ Mikey has decided to vandalize the Hollywood Sign to promote the album.
☆ No he didn't get clearance from Ben... did you expect Mikey to be responsible?
☆ And now he's been arrested and Ben is probably ready to kill him.
☆ Your role is completely open. You can be anyone you want, ben's assistant, someone else being thrown in jail, a crazed fan come to bail him out.
creator: m00nprincess
